channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Missouri’s new US House map goes to court while Louisiana and South Carolina consider redistricting
item.description: Missouri’s new congressional districts are facing a key legal challenge while Republican lawmakers in Louisiana and South Carolina consider redistricting.

item.title: Ship operator and employee are charged in crash that caused the deadly collapse of Baltimore bridge
What to know about states’ efforts to limit corporate donations in politics
